nasb.text: How long? Is there anything in the hearts of the prophets who prophesy falsehood, even these prophets of the deception of their own heart,

esv.text: How long shall there be lies in the heart of the prophets who prophesy lies, and who prophesy the deceit of their own heart,

cnv.text: 那些先知心裡存著這樣的意念要到幾時呢？他們說虛假的預言，說出自己心中的詭詐；

ccb.text: 这些先知谎话连篇，凭空预言要到何时呢？
